title: PCB Board Plate Filling
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs the transfer of buffer to various wells on a custom PCB board. It will delay for 1 minute and repeat the same transfers. --- * [P20 single-channel GEN2 electronic pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) ---
steps_raw: This protocol performs the transfer of buffer to various wells on a custom PCB board. It will delay for 1 minute and repeat the same transfers. --- * [P20 single-channel GEN2 electronic pipette](https://shop.opentrons.com/collections/ot-2-pipettes/products/single-channel-electronic-pipette) ---
Upload your protocol into the OT App.
Set up your deck according to the deck map.
Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
